nodes.name: casl-compliance
nodes.description: Mandatory compliance gate before any outbound (email, SMS, blast). Verifies consent, opt-out status, CASL footer, send window, and daily cap.

nodes.name: codex-delegation
nodes.description: Intelligent routing between Solara and Codex — decides when to delegate backend tasks to Codex vs handle internally.

nodes.name: cold-outreach-blast
nodes.description: Queue a cold outreach campaign to a segmented lead list via the cold_outreach_campaigns endpoint, with CASL compliance enforced before any send.
nodes.argument_hint: Which cold lead list (by name or ID) and what message template should I use?

nodes.name: daily-call-sheet-workflow
nodes.description: Generates the structured daily call sheet for Ezra — 6 prioritized categories, specific opening lines for each call, and a clear action order.

nodes.name: follow-up-discipline
nodes.description: Surfaces overdue follow-ups, prioritizes the call list, and recommends specific outreach actions for each stuck deal or contact.

nodes.name: funding-vocabulary
nodes.description: Domain literacy for MCA and alternative business funding. Reference glossary and clarifying-question guide for when operators use ambiguous terms.

nodes.name: lender-intelligence
nodes.description: Uses historical lender feedback data to recommend the best lenders for a specific deal profile and surfaces typical terms and decline patterns.
nodes.argument_hint: What's the deal profile? (industry, monthly revenue, FICO, position count, NSF count)

nodes.name: memory-journaling
nodes.description: Structured decision and pattern logging. Guides Solara through writing high-quality entries to memory/DECISIONS.md, memory/PATTERNS.md, or memory/MISTAKES.md with proper frontmatter, cross-links, and version tags.

nodes.name: operator-handoff
nodes.description: Pause cleanly at a decision boundary, surface the decision to Ezra via Telegram or dashboard chat, and wait for explicit confirmation before proceeding.

nodes.name: renewal-window-detection
nodes.description: Identifies funded deals that have crossed the renewal eligibility threshold (default 40% paid back) and drafts targeted renewal outreach for each.

nodes.name: shop-out-routing
nodes.description: When operator says "shop this deal," route the application to the right lenders, surface the dry-run plan with warnings, and queue the actual threads.
nodes.argument_hint: Which application ID (or applicant name) should I shop out?

nodes.name: systematic-debugging
nodes.description: Use when encountering any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior in SunBiz-Agent systems — before proposing any fix.

nodes.name: underwriting-flow
nodes.description: Trigger and interpret underwriting on an application — parse bank statements, read risk flags, produce a readiness score, and recommend the next action.
nodes.argument_hint: Which application ID should I run underwriting on?

nodes.name: ab_testing_engine
nodes.description: SunBiz Funding - A/B Testing & Budget Optimization Engine ========================================================== Bayesian optimization via Facebook's Ax platform (ax-platform). Falls back to heuristic-based optimization when ax-platform is not installed.

nodes.name: ad_copy_generator
nodes.description: SunBiz Funding - AI Ad Copy Generator ======================================= Generates MCA-compliant ad copy for SunBiz Funding campaigns.

nodes.name: adon_seed_lender_constraints
nodes.description: SunBiz — interactive seeder for lender restricted_states + restricted_industries ================================================================================ The SOP §4 scoring in oasis-command-center's lib/lenders/match-fitness.ts consumes lender.restricted_states[] and lend

nodes.name: agent_genome
nodes.description: agent_genome.py — verify an agent repo fully expresses the genome.

nodes.name: agent_sleep
nodes.description: agent_sleep — Nightly memory consolidation by an LLM judge.

nodes.name: api_server
nodes.description: Sun Biz Agent hosted API surface.

nodes.name: audit_logger
nodes.description: Campaign audit logging — tracks every change made via the API. ============================================================== Appends structured JSON Lines records to data/audit/audit_log.jsonl. Each line is one self-contained AuditEntry serialised as JSON.

nodes.name: backfill_sunbiz_stages
nodes.description: backfill_sunbiz_stages.py — one-shot migration of pre-2026-05-17 stage values.

nodes.name: bridge_tool_underwriting_run
nodes.description: bridge_tool_underwriting_run.py — SunBiz underwriting bridge-tool body.

nodes.name: build_capability_graph
nodes.description: Build Capability Graph — auto-discover every skill, script, agent, MCP server, workflow, and integration in this repo and emit a single machine-readable graph at brain/CAPABILITY_GRAPH.json.

nodes.name: cache_layer
nodes.description: TTL-based caching layer for Meta and Google Ads API responses. ============================================================== File-based cache stored as JSON in data/cache/. Each cache entry is a separate .json file containing the value and an expiry timestamp.

nodes.name: capability_query
nodes.description: Capability Query — runtime tool-tree resolver for agents.

nodes.name: cold_outreach_runner
nodes.description: cold_outreach_runner.py — drain cold_outreach_campaigns through send_gateway.

nodes.name: daily_plan_generator
nodes.description: daily_plan_generator.py — build today's daily_plan_items for the operator's Daily Plan tab.

nodes.name: diag_lead_visibility
nodes.description: One-off diagnostic for the 'where did my imported leads go?' question.

nodes.name: diag_manifest_drift
nodes.description: Check whether tenant_manifests DB row for slug='sun' matches the in-code SUN_SEED. The DB row wins at runtime — if it's stale, all the seeds.ts edits this session don't take effect for the live tenant.

nodes.name: doctor
nodes.description: Sun Biz Agent runtime doctor.

nodes.name: email_blast
nodes.description: SunBiz Funding — Production-Grade Gmail Email Blast Engine =========================================================== Thread-safe, rate-limited bulk email sender with CAN-SPAM compliance, unsubscribe management, campaign tracking, and exponential-backoff retries.

nodes.name: enrich_leads
nodes.description: enrich_leads.py — Google Sheets lead-enrichment workflow tool.

nodes.name: follow_up_generator
nodes.description: follow_up_generator.py — generate follow_up_tasks for stuck/missing-info/no-response leads.

nodes.name: full_diagnostic
nodes.description: Full diagnostic — SunBiz Meta Ads health check.

nodes.name: generate_google_ads_token
nodes.description: Generate Google Ads OAuth token JSON for the cohnen/mcp-google-ads server.

nodes.name: generate_logo
nodes.description: Generate a clean SunBiz Funding logo with transparent background using Gemini.

nodes.name: generate_page_assets
nodes.description: Generate Facebook page profile picture and cover photo using Gemini.

nodes.name: genome_sync
nodes.description: genome_sync.py — stamp the germline seed (PERSONAL.md) into every runtime entry point.

nodes.name: imagen_generate
nodes.description: SunBiz Funding — Production-Grade AI Ad Creative Generator =========================================================== Gemini Imagen (Nano Banana) + Pillow Logo Compositing

nodes.name: import_lender_catalog
nodes.description: import_lender_catalog.py — bulk import / update known_funding_companies.

nodes.name: import_mca_leads
nodes.description: import_mca_leads.py — bulk-import Adon's MCA web-form lead list into the SunBiz tenant.

nodes.name: kixie_tool
nodes.description: Kixie CLI Tool — outbound dialer + click-to-call + live transfer.

nodes.name: lender_response_classifier
nodes.description: lender_response_classifier.py — close the loop on lender shop-out.

nodes.name: mca_lead_scrubber
nodes.description: mca_lead_scrubber.py — the "Breeze UW Entry Sheet" automation.

nodes.name: migrate_leads_to_tenant_records
nodes.description: migrate_leads_to_tenant_records.py ==================================

nodes.name: monitoring
nodes.description: Real-time campaign monitoring, anomaly detection, and alerting system. ======================================================================= Wraps a MetaAdsEngine instance to provide scheduled health checks, anomaly detection, budget pacing alerts, CTR/CPC deviation alerts, dis

nodes.name: no_contact_24h_monitor
nodes.description: no_contact_24h_monitor.py — Build 1: active-deal 24h-no-contact follow-up.

nodes.name: performance_reporter
nodes.description: SunBiz Funding — Performance Reporter ======================================== Pulls Meta Ads performance data and formats it into clean human-readable reports. Uses MetaAdsEngine for all API calls — no direct HTTP calls here.

nodes.name: populate_sunbiz_lender_catalog
nodes.description: populate_sunbiz_lender_catalog.py — load the SOP-curated SunBiz lender catalog into `tenant_records` so the dashboard's /lenders directory and the Shopping Out tab render every funder from `Lender List SOP.pdf`.

nodes.name: reconcile_sunbiz_sequences
nodes.description: Reconcile drip_sequences in the live Sun Biz tenant against the post-migration-064 seed in lib/sunbiz-default-sequences.ts.

nodes.name: renewal_reminder
nodes.description: renewal_reminder.py — daily sweep of funded deals approaching renewal window.

nodes.name: repair_sunbiz_sequence_bodies
nodes.description: repair_sunbiz_sequence_bodies.py — one-off repair for the 2026-05-25 seeding defect that left every SunBiz drip_sequences row without message content.

nodes.name: save_logo
nodes.description: Save the SunBiz Funding logo to media/brand/sunbiz_logo.png

nodes.name: send_gateway
nodes.description: Send Gateway — the single outbound chokepoint for every autonomous action Bravo performs on behalf of CC's empire.

nodes.name: sentinel
nodes.description: sentinel.py — merchant-reply sentiment scorer + auto-pause arbiter.

nodes.name: sequence_runner
nodes.description: sequence_runner.py — drip-campaign daemon (Phase 4.3 of SunBiz CRM).

nodes.name: setup
nodes.description: Sun Biz Agent setup script.

nodes.name: setup_check
nodes.description: setup_check.py — SunBiz Day-1 readiness gate.

nodes.name: shop_out_sender
nodes.description: shop_out_sender.py — Phase 6.3-bis + migration 069 (2026-05-25). 2026-05-25 meeting expansion: owner_phone substitution added so outbound shop-out emails carry the assigned rep's direct number, not the brand identity default. Requires migration 069 `owner_phone` column on applica

nodes.name: sms_engine
nodes.description: Sun Biz Agent — Multi-Provider SMS Engine (V1).

nodes.name: sunbiz_constants
nodes.description: sunbiz_constants.py — single source of truth for SunBiz tenant identity.

nodes.name: sunbiz_guards
nodes.description: sunbiz_guards.py — SunBiz-specific outbound-guard configuration.

nodes.name: sunbiz_health_check
nodes.description: sunbiz_health_check.py — standing read-only auditor for the SunBiz backend.

nodes.name: text_torrent_tool
nodes.description: TextTorrent CLI Tool — direct API client for SMS blast + analytics + local- area-code phone management.

nodes.name: underwriting_orchestrator
nodes.description: underwriting_orchestrator.py — automatic underwriting daemon.

nodes.name: uw_lead_enricher
nodes.description: uw_lead_enricher.py - keep approved Breeze UW leads complete.

nodes.name: ad-launch
nodes.description: Create and launch new ads within an existing campaign — copy, creative, compliance, and activation.

nodes.name: audience
nodes.description: Build or refine targeting audiences — keywords, custom audiences, lookalikes, and interest-based targeting.

nodes.name: campaign-create
nodes.description: Full campaign creation wizard — platform selection, strategy, SEO keywords, copy, creative, compliance check, and launch.

nodes.name: commit
nodes.description: Smart git commit with secret scanning, referential integrity checks, and capability count verification.

nodes.name: debug
nodes.description: Systematic 4-phase debugging — investigate, pattern analysis, hypothesis testing, and documented resolution.

nodes.name: health
nodes.description: Full system diagnostic — API connectivity, token validity, campaign health, compliance, and infrastructure checks.

nodes.name: optimize
nodes.description: Analyze underperforming campaigns and apply data-driven optimizations to creative, audience, budget, and bidding.

nodes.name: performance
nodes.description: Pull cross-platform ad performance metrics with insights and actionable recommendations.

nodes.name: prime
nodes.description: Load full agent context — brain, memory, state, and quick health check for session start.

nodes.name: report
nodes.description: Generate comprehensive performance reports — daily snapshots, weekly analysis, or monthly executive summaries.

nodes.name: sync
nodes.description: End-of-session sync — update state, tasks, session log, capture patterns, and commit to git.
